strengths: Clear alignment of the IA prompt with all three chosen objects, demonstrating an understanding of knowledge, belief and opinion
Wellâidentified objects with realâworld contexts (DNA fingerprint, misbaha, perspective cartoon) satisfying the requirement of specificity
Use of quantitative evidence (e.g., 99 % DNA accuracy) to support the distinction of empirically verifiable knowledge
Consistent citations provided for each object, reflecting attention to academic conventions
weaknesses: Analysis often remains descriptive and does not consistently deepen the conceptual distinctions between knowledge, belief and opinion
Overreliance on generic stock images limits the authenticity and precision of the objectsâ contexts
Inconsistent and incomplete referencing and formatting in the bibliography and captions weakens academic rigor
Final synthesis lacks a clear, nuanced summary of how each object uniquely informs the IA prompt
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exhibition satisfies the criteria for a band-5-6 performance: it clearly identifies three distinct objects with real-world contexts, links each to the IA prompt and offers justification supported by appropriate evidence. The strengths in prompt alignment, object selection and use of quantitative support push the work to the upper end of the band. However, uneven analytical depth, reliance on generic images and inconsistent citation practices prevent it from reaching the highest bands. Given these factorsâand the official total mark of 6âthe submission merits a solid 6, reflecting strong execution with areas for deeper analysis and greater precision.

annotations.comment: The glass-of-water example is promising; explicitly outline which interpretations constitute knowledge, belief or opinion to reinforce your conclusion.
The IA prompt is clearly stated and aligns well with the exhibitionâs focus, providing a solid foundation for analysis of knowledge, belief and opinion.
The theme âknowledge and the knowerâ is appropriate, but the student should explicitly reference this theme when justifying each object to deepen coherence with the prompt.
An overview of the three chosen objects on the introduction page would guide the readerâs expectations and strengthen the structural organization of the exhibition.
Selecting the original DNA fingerprint photograph is a strong choice; it concretely illustrates empirically verifiable knowledge and links directly to the promptâs focus.
The caption for Figure A lacks full source details; include author, date, and publication to strengthen academic rigor and traceability.
The discussion of DNAâs factual verifiability is descriptive but lacks critical depth. Consider analysing how scientific consensus and fallibility affect our confidence in âknowledge.â
The final paragraph lacks a clear synthesis of distinctions; summarise how each object uniquely informs the prompt rather than reiterating generalities.
The claim that it is âhard to distinguishâ between knowledge, belief and opinion needs more nuance. Compare criteria such as evidence standards and communal validation to clarify differences.
Footnote formatting is inconsistent and incomplete, making it difficult to verify sources. Adopt a standard referencing style (e.g., MLA or APA) consistently across all entries.
Using a stock image of misbaha limits the objectâs specificity. If possible, provide a photograph of the actual beads you wish to discuss to enhance authenticity.
The caption for Figure B should specify the provenance of these prayer beads. Indicating collection date or owner would strengthen the real-world context.
The initial definition of belief is overly general. Tie this definition back to how belief differs from knowledge by discussing criteria like justification and evidence.
The paragraph on misbaha ends abruptly (âA contradictory situation isâ). Ensure complete sentences and ideas, and tie contradictions explicitly to belief vs opinion distinctions.
Multiple footnotes reference the same source separately; consolidate these to avoid redundancy and improve the flow of evidence.
The transition from belief to opinion analysis is weak; explicitly compare how misbaha belief outcomes differ in justification from opinions formed through personal views.
The cartoon in Figure C appears to be a generic stock image. Clarify if this was a deliberate artefact choice or consider replacing it with a more personalized example.
The caption for Figure C omits author or publication details. Providing a full citation will improve credibility and link to the promptâs intellectual context.
The definition of opinion remains surface-level; dive deeper into how opinions rely on personal perspectives and knowledge frameworks to distinguish from belief.
The lengthy discussion of the 6/9 cartoon is descriptive rather than analytical. Link the perspective conflict more explicitly to the promptâs distinction criteria.
Consider adding signposting transitions between concluding sentences to improve the flow and guide the reader through your final argument.
Bibliography heading styling is inconsistent; standardize formatting (font size, bolding) to present a professional and uniform reference section.
The âWorks Citedâ subheading duplicates header style; merge or reformat to avoid redundancy and clarify hierarchy within the bibliography.
The first citation lacks publication date; include full bibliographic details to ensure entries meet academic conventions.
Citation formats vary across entries (some include access dates, others do not). Adopt a single referencing style and apply it consistently.
The final bibliography entry omits an access date. Ensure each online source includes retrieval information for full traceability.

strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
